cloudClasses.description: Anvil preset names to route to the native provider (bypassing anvil). Default: ["planning"]. Used when ANVIL_CLOUD_CLASSES is unset; overridden by the env var when non-empty (comma-separated).

routeEndpoint.description: If set, POST to this URL (anvil's /v1/route, T007) for an authoritative local/cloud tier decision instead of the fast client-side keyword heuristic. Falls back to client-side on any error/timeout. Used when ANVIL_ROUTE_ENDPOINT is unset; overridden by the env var when non-empty. Leave unset (the default) for the zero-round-trip client-side path.

routeTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for routeEndpoint authoritative probes. Used when ANVIL_ROUTE_TIMEOUT_MS is unset. Default: 30; raise for split-host/Tailscale deployments.

routeAuthEnv.description: Optional env var name containing the token for an authenticated routeEndpoint, for example ANVIL_ROUTER_TOKEN. Used when ANVIL_ROUTE_AUTH_ENV is unset; overridden by the env var when non-empty. This is an env var name, never the raw token.

nativeProvider.description: OpenClaw provider id used for cloud-preferred presets and authoritative route exhaustion. Used when ANVIL_NATIVE_PROVIDER is unset. Default: anthropic.

nativeModel.description: Model id within nativeProvider used for cloud-preferred presets and authoritative route exhaustion. Used when ANVIL_NATIVE_MODEL is unset. Default: claude-sonnet-4-5.
